# Backend Observability Platform

Sanitized project fixture describing backend platform work with service ownership,
data persistence, and operational quality.

## Evidence

- [EV-BACKEND-API] Built Python FastAPI services with PostgreSQL persistence, Redis queues, Docker packaging, and typed request validation for internal workflow automation.
- [EV-BACKEND-OBS] Added OpenTelemetry traces, structured logging, latency dashboards, and regression alerts to reduce time spent diagnosing backend failures.
- [EV-BACKEND-CI] Expanded unit and integration tests in CI for API, database, and queue workflows before release.
